name: Michael Kupietz
html:
bash — terminal
guest@namewall:~$ whoami
michael kupietz
guest@namewall:~$ echo $HANDLE
kupietools
guest@namewall:~$ _▋
css: .kupietools-term { display: flex; flex-direction: column; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: #0d1117; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.7), 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.07); box-sizing: border-box; } .kt-titlebar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #1c2028; padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #2a2f3a; flex-shrink: 0; } .kt-dot { width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-block; } .kt-red { background: #ff5f57; } .kt-yellow { background: #febc2e; } .kt-green { background: #28c840; } .kt-title { flex: 1; text-align: center; font-size: clamp(9px, 1.5vw, 12px); color: #6b7280; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .kt-body { flex: 1; padding: clamp(8px, 2vw, 16px); display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; gap: clamp(4px, 1.2vw, 10px); overflow: hidden; } .kt-line { display: flex; align-items: baseline; flex-wrap: wrap; font-size: clamp(10px, 2vw, 15px); line-height: 1.5; } .kt-prompt { color: #3ecf8e; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap; } .kt-at { color: #6b7280; } .kt-path { color: #58a6ff; } .kt-dollar { color: #e2e8f0; margin-right: 2px; } .kt-cmd { color: #e2e8f0; } .kt-output { color: #7ee787; padding-left: clamp(4px, 1vw, 8px); font-size: clamp(11px, 2.2vw, 16px); font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.03em; text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(126,231,135,0.4); } .kt-cursor { display: inline-block; color: #3ecf8e; animation: kt-blink 1.1s step-end infinite; font-size: clamp(10px, 2vw, 15px); } @keyframes kt-blink { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0; } }
